recipe.title: Ground Turkey Enchilada Skillet
steps: Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground turkey and cook, breaking apart, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir in taco seasoning, enchilada sauce, beans, corn, and salsa. Simmer 3 minutes.
Sprinkle cheese over the top and transfer to a 375°F oven.
Bake until cheese is bubbly, about 10 minutes.
Let rest 2 minutes, then serve with sour cream and cilantro.
